Container.Name: Lodestar
Container.Overview:
Lodestar is a high-performance discovery interface for Bitmagnet. It features a bespoke discovery engine using PGroonga for blazingly fast deep-file searches, tiered relevance ranking (Gold/Silver/Bronze), and a mobile-friendly progressive UI.
[br][b][span style='color: #E80000;']CRITICAL:[/span][/b] This requires a PostgreSQL database with the [b]PGroonga[/b] extension installed and the Lodestar SQL optimization script applied. Please see the project README for the mandatory database preparation steps.

Config.Name: Appdata Directory (Scripts)
Config.Description: Location for custom scripts (like janitor.js). Do not change the target to /app or it will overwrite the container's source code.

Config.Name: Postgres Connection URL
Config.Description: The full connection string for your Bitmagnet PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: The port Lodestar uses for its web interface.

Container.Changes: - Initial Release - Template locally locked to prevent variable reset - Added /app/scripts path mapping for persistent script execution
